stemHtml:
What is correct about dependent parallel approaches?

Dependent parallel approaches may be conducted to parallel runways provided that the missed approach track for one approach diverges by…

options.a: At least 15° from the missed approach track of the adjacent approach.
options.b: At least 30° from the missed approach track of the adjacent approach.
options.c: At least 35° from the missed approach track of the adjacent approach.
options.d: At least 45° from the missed approach track of the adjacent approach.
